sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ يُعْتَبَرُ مَهَارَةً مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا لِلشَّبَابِ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja se smatra veoma važnom vještinom za mlade danas.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming is considered a very important skill for youth today.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الْمُبَرْمِجُ أَكْوَادًا خَاصَّةً لِصِنَاعَةِ بَرَامِجَ وَمَوَاقِعَ مُفِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Programer piše posebne kodove za izradu korisnih programa i web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: The programmer writes special codes to create useful programs and websites.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ لُغَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِثْلُ بَايْثُون وَجَافَا يُمْكِنُ دِرَاسَتُهَا بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Postoje mnogi jezici poput Pythona i Jave koji se mogu lako izučavati.
sentences.translationEn: There are many languages like Python and Java that can be studied easily.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِهْنَةُ عَلَى تَنْمِيَةِ التَّفْكِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِيِّ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Ova profesija pomaže u razvoju logičkog razmišljanja i kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This profession helps in developing logical thinking and creativity.
